summary: SSE newline fix NOT effective. EventStream tab still shows 0 parsed events. tRPC mutation #5 rejected. Warning NOT displayed in chat. Same result as #434.

details.comparison_with_434: Identical behavior - EventStream tab empty, mutation error persists
details.root_cause:
SSE body format still incorrect. DevTools EventStream parser expects standard SSE format: each event must start with 'data: ' prefix followed by JSON, then terminated with two newlines (

 or 

). The literal 
 in DB may still not be converted to actual newline bytes in the HTTP/2 DATA frame. Possible issues: (1) H2 frame chunking breaks SSE delimiter, (2) newlines encoded as 
 instead of 
, (3) data: prefix missing, (4) extra whitespace or BOM.
